mnemonics: Class is like a blueprint or a template for creating objects
Objects are the real-world representation of the data
keyPoints: Key Point 1: The main function in Java is the entry point of the application and is called when the application is started.
Key Point 2: The 'this' keyword in Java is used to refer to the current object of the class.
Key Point 3: Inheritance in Java is a mechanism by which one class can inherit the properties and behavior of another class.
